# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
version: 0.1.0

dependencies: []

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
  selector:
    app: my-application

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-application
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-application
          image: my-application:latest
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: my-application-config
data:
  config.yaml: |
    key: value

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: my-application-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  password: cGFzc3dvcmQ=
